titleStmt.title: SII 26.122: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 122. (A.R. No. 118 of 1909.) KOMARALIṄGAM, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north base of the Karivaradarāja-perumāḷ temple.

This inscription records the royal order addressed to Anantanārāyaṇa-bhaṭṭan alias Tiruvālukku-aḍiyaṉ of Aḻagar-Tirumalai in Pāṇḍi-maṇḍalam informing the grant of land, for the merit of the king, to the maṭha of the servants, engaged in burning lamps, of the temple of Aḻagar-Tirumalai by Śeña •••• nārāyaṇan, Āḷavandi alias Brahmapallavaraiyan of Śrī-Vīranārāyaṇa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Vīrakēraḷa-vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīparaWritten before line 2.
kesariWritten before line 3.
svastiśrī . koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ pāṇṭimaṇṭalattu Aḻakartirumalaipulattiruviḷakku Erikkum tiruviḷakkuppiccarkaḷukkumiṭañceyyum pāṭakattu Anantanārāyaṇa bhaṭṭaṉāna tiruvālukku Aṭiyāṉukku nammolai kuṭu
ttapaṭiyāvatu veṇṭaiyūrkkāl virakeraḷavaḷanāṭṭu brahmadeyam śrīviranārāyaṇaccaturvvedimaṅkalattu ceña nārāyaṇan Āḷavantiyāna brahmappallavaraiyan Ittiruviḷakkum pittarkaḷmaṭa
ttukku ṉamakku naṉṟāka tan Iṟaiyiruppu nilattil viṭṭa nilam Iraṇṭu māviṉ kīḻ nālumā Innilam Iraṇṭu māviṉkīḻnālumāvukkum nāṅkellaiyāvatu Ariyava ceytacoḻamannaṟaiyil cempiyan mukkokkiḻānaṭivatikku vaṭakkum Amanimāṇikkavati nokki ṭātānkaṇ Ippan
periyatāḻai poyiṟkiḻ nilam Oru māvum Āka nilam Oru māvaraiyin kiḻ nālumā vukkum nānkellaiyāvatu kaṇṇāṟṟukkum Avani kkālukku kiḻakkum periyatāḻḻai poyiṟkaṇṇāṟṟukku teṟkkum virakeraḷacakalaceṭ lattukku meṟkku tanilata kku vaṭakku cilaiceṭ kku va kku kum Innāṉkellaikkumuṭpa
ṭṭa nilam Oru māvaraiyin kiḻ nālumāvum viranārāyaṇa mannaṟaiyil maturamāṇikkavatikkuk kiḻakkum viranārāyaṇavāykkālukku vaṭakkum piḷḷaiyā ni kaṇṇāṟṟin kiḻnilam Araimāvukku nānkellaiyāvatu śrīra[ ]bhaṭṭasomaiyāji nilattukkuk kiḻakkum kaṇṇāṟṟuvaṭakku cca nilata ṟkum vinotaviṇṇakā veṇṭai yaruḷina ttukku nilattukku meṟkkum
Innānkellaikkumuppaṭṭa nilam Araimāvum Āka nilam Iraṇṭu māvinkiḻnālumā Innilam Iraṇṭumāviṉkiḻ nālumāvukkum kaṭamai mañcāṭi Iṟai puravi siddāyam Elavai Ukavai maṟṟum Eṟppeṟpaṭṭanavum koḷḷātoḻikkavum namakku naṉṟāka muṉṟāvatu kār mpu Udānam tom Ittiruviḷakku namakku naṉṟāka Iṟaiceluttuvānākavum
Idhanmam candrātittavaṟ celvatāka cempilum kallilum veṭṭikkoḷḷap peṟuvārkaḷāka nammolai kuṭuttom kkal Ivai śrī yasomayāji Eḻuttu § ṟṟu payattu ma no
Digital edition of SII 26.122 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
